scripts.format: oxfmt .oxfmtrc.json package.json pnpm-workspace.yaml turbo.json tsconfig.base.json backend frontend
scripts.format:check: oxfmt --check .oxfmtrc.json package.json pnpm-workspace.yaml turbo.json tsconfig.base.json && turbo run format:check
scripts.test:integration: pnpm --filter @markr/backend build && pnpm --filter @markr/backend test:integration && pnpm --filter @markr/frontend build && pnpm --filter @markr/frontend test:integration
scripts.validate: pnpm format:check && pnpm lint && pnpm typecheck && pnpm test && pnpm coverage && pnpm build
